title: Spring Valley HomeCare (Nursing Home)
subTitle: Spring Valley Homecare (J.B.) Sdn Bhd
address: 3456, Jalan Lurah Utama, Kampung Kempas Bahru, 81200 Johor Bahru, Johor Darul Ta'zim, Malaysia

peopleAlsoSearch.title: Green Acres Elderly Care Centre Managed By Green Acres Residence Care (Group) Sdn. Bhd.

reviews.text:
A month ago, due to unavoidable circumstances, I had to place my mother at Spring Valley Home Care. I was initially worried that she might not get used to the environment or face any issues, but she has received excellent care here. Seeing her current condition has truly put my mind at ease.
A big thank you to Ada, Nurse Shalini, Arvy, and all the other staff members (the lovely “kakak”s).
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Much appreciate you trust us & satisfied with our services. We will try our best to keep it up. Thank you!

reviews.text: Safe Environment with Kind staff

We placed our mother here during the last stage of her life. The caregivers were patient, caring, and experienced in handling her condition and mood swings, always updating us on her situation. We’re grateful for their compassion and support during such a difficult period.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Very much appreciate our efforts done been honoured by you. We really try our best to take care & accompany our residents here because we treasure every single life. Once again thanks for choosing our nursing services & do recommend to others who needed.  Thank you so much!

reviews.text:
Deciding to seek professional care for my dad was tough, but it was the best decision for his well-being. My helper did her best, but my dad's needs exceeded their capabilities, especially with medication management.

Spring Valley Homecare provided the support he needed, and I'm grateful for their care. The entire team, including Nurse Arvy, Mr. Prem, Ms. Ada, and all the other staff, have been incredibly friendly, helpful, and kept us updated promptly. Their professionalism and compassion gave us peace of mind.

Today, I visited my dad and was thrilled to see him looking healthy, full of energy, and responsive. Thank you to the whole team for your dedication and care 🙏🏻.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your compliments. We are pleased that you & your dad love our place here. We shall continually to serve you better. Appreciate any feedback helping for improvement in our nursing services. Thank you so much!
Thanks for like of our nursing home!
Appreciate feedback from you to improve our service, thanks
Thanks for rating!
Thanks for rating!

reviews.text: Very nice to client
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for rating! We always get ready to serve you better!

reviews.text: Staff at Spring Valley HomeCare is caring towards my dad during his stay there. Management responded promptly to my requests and concerns. Thank you!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for sharing your good experience here. We always get ready to serve better here. Thanks. Best wishes to you too.

reviews.text: Staffs from this home care are caring, patient and responsible. The environment is clean and comfortable.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for compliments. Our nursing home is established since 2006 & well managed by our boss with nursing standard.

reviews.text: Clean and safe environment. Staff SVH are very friendly, polite and kind.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for compliments! We here get ready to serve better. Appreciate your recommendation to others needed services.

reviews.text:
感恩温心乐龄院的负责人和看护。还有里面一起住的老人们。
我家婆在这里静养很开心，可以认识新朋友。在刚开始进去时，住同一楼的人会去关系她，分享食物给她。感觉很温馨。

这里的服务不错，工作人员都很和善，有问题都会一一解答，也很耐心。价钱也很合理！！！值得推荐👍👍👍
reviews.textTranslated:
Grateful to the staff and caregivers of Wenxin Senior Home, and to all the other elderly residents.

My mother-in-law is very happy here, enjoying her time and making new friends. When she first arrived, the residents on her floor would visit her and share food with her. It was a very heartwarming experience.

The service here is excellent; the staff are all very kind and patient, answering all questions thoroughly. The prices are also very reasonable! Highly recommended! 👍👍👍
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: 感谢您的称赞！我们感到光荣， 因为住户开心， 家属放心， 大家都能安心生活。 我们的价格非常平民， 是一般民众都负担得来的。 我们的服务也是有系统化和一定的水平。 专业护士是我们坚持给予住户的健康保障。

reviews.text: structured & experienced nursing home since YR2006

reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your rating!

reviews.text: 还行吧 没这么不堪 so far都不错
reviews.textTranslated: It's alright, not that bad. So far, it's not bad.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: 感谢您的认证！ 虚心欢迎任何指教！

reviews.text:
温心疗养院 院如其名 时时刻刻都温暖着老人家还有老人家的家人
我的姐姐6月16号在家跌倒 不能行走 因我本身有上班 不方便照顾姐姐 我的外甥女千挑万选 选了温心疗养院 6月26号姐姐入这家疗养院 万万没想到姐姐在这疗养院的第2天终于能自己行走 太感动了。
我要感谢这间疗养院的经理 更要感谢这里的护士和工作人员 亲眼所见护士和工作人员都把这里的老人家如同自己的父母 把老人家照顾的无微不至 感谢疗养院所有的护士和工作人员 我看见你您们的用心 更看见您们的辛苦付出。
感谢的话 说之不尽 除了感谢还是感谢
我会介绍我的朋友们 如果家里有老人家需要被照顾 我会推荐这家温心疗养院
我姐姐现在很好 她住的非常开心 就因为护士和工作人员的热心服务 我才会介绍更多老人来住这家疗养院。
reviews.textTranslated:
Warm Heart Nursing Home, true to its name, provides warmth and comfort to the elderly and their families at all times.

My sister fell at home on June 16th and couldn't walk. Because I'm at work and couldn't easily care for her, my niece carefully selected Warm Heart Nursing Home. My sister entered on June 26th, and to my utter surprise, she was able to walk on her own on her second day there! I was so moved.

I want to thank the manager of this nursing home, and even more so the nurses and staff. I witnessed firsthand how they treated the elderly like their own parents, providing meticulous care. Thank you to all the nurses and staff; I see your dedication and hard work.

Words of gratitude are endless. I will recommend Warm Heart Nursing Home to my friends. If you have elderly family members who need care, I will recommend this nursing home.

My sister is doing very well now; she's very happy there. Because of the warm service from the nurses and staff, I will recommend this nursing home to more elderly people.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: 感谢您多年来的信任和支持！ 我们也很开心，您这么时刻关心姐姐， 常来探访， 并介绍给很多人。 我们尽可能满足住户的各类需求，如素食或其他， 在标准的作业系统中融入客制化及合理化。

reviews.text: Good environment  and reasonable price
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for comments. Our price is really reasonable in market but with standard nursing services.

reviews.text: 由于我外婆行动不便和有少许老人痴呆，所以无法给于全面和适当的照顾，在百般无奈下送了她进这家养，起初是非常的不适应，但过了一段时间后，发觉其实在他们的的照顾之下，是好过我们在家照顾的多。。。。整体来说，他们是适当的照顾，换句话说，给于老人家有适当的照顾也給于我们要找吃的家人来说是最好的选择。。。个人觉得是适合的。。
reviews.textTranslated: Because my grandmother has limited mobility and a mild case of dementia, we couldn't provide her with comprehensive and appropriate care. In desperation, we sent her to this care facility. Initially, she found it very difficult to adjust, but after a while, she realized that their care was actually better than what we provided at home. Overall, they provide appropriate care; in other words, providing proper care for the elderly is the best option for our family members who need food. Personally, I think it's suitable.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: 多谢您的肯定！与其让老人家白天孤零零待在家， 家人在外工作打拼， 还要时刻担心她的安危， 不如选择好的安老院其实也是爱护长辈的表现。至少老人家得到全面照顾， 也有人陪伴，家人可以安心工作上学。只要多抽空来探望， 这就是最好的安排！！！
Thanks for rating!

reviews.text: Good and reliable services
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your compliments! We are ready to serve better! Kindly help to recommend to others needed services. Thank you!
Thanks for rating!

reviews.text: I HAPPY TO LET MYFATHR TO STAY IN HOME CARE BECAUSE THEY TAKE CARE .AND ALL THE NURSES AND STUFF VERY GOOD THANKS FOR ALL
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your positive feedback. Hoped you can recommend our nursing services to others. Thank you

reviews.text: nice environment, the staff there very friendly and helpful, reasonable price
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for positive comments. Our staffs here are all experienced & well maintain our facilities since YR2006. Our price is also reasonable & affordable.

reviews.text: Place was out of the way, didn't provide good food, night time not taking care of elderly...facebook youtube, old people flagging flat, is a nursing home waiting to die early n faster.

My mom was in this home for the past 5 years and I must say that their quality of care has deteriorated significantly. My mom has witnessed the staff ill treating the elderly folks staying there and even beat them and kicked a woman recently. The staff warned and threatened those around not to report it to the management.
Due to covid restrictions imposed by the home, they did not allow our family to visit mom inside the home, so we didn't know what was the conditions inside until recently my sister got permission to go in to see mom since mom was not mobile. She was shocked to see how the property is not cleaned property and the care was really bad for the residents inside.
They did not administer the medicines for my mom properly and unfortunately my mom passed away recently due to negligence and carelessness of the staff at the home.
The food is bad and the quality of food is not good though they charge increased fees.
I do not recommend this place at all. This is supposed to be a homecare for the elderly, but they literally treat all residents as though they are in hospice waiting to die. Very disappointed and hopefully the management will look into improving the care or just shut it down!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
It is unbecoming of a pastor to spread malicious lies without verifying the facts.

You have not visited your mother at the Spring Valley Homecare (SVH) even once. How can you comment based on hearsay? Are you so unfilial and guilty that you have to shift the blame to an innocent party by posting slanderous accusations online? Do you have any conscience that you are defaming us and affecting the care we are providing. Who are you to criticise us with your lies and evil demand to shut down. 

We are licensed by the Federal authorities and subject to inspection by The Ministry of Health prior to each renewal. Many long-term residents and positive feedback is testimony to the service we provide. You are a rare specimen of an ungrateful customer who has a personal agenda.

Your mother came to our nursing home at the age of 83 with a host of serious chronic medical pre-conditions; diabetes, hypertension.........  That she survived to the age of 88 (through Covid) is remarkable, in spite of carbonated sweet drinks and unhealthy oily spicy food (against our advice) indulged by the family during their visits. We even assigned an Indian nurse (Kethi) specifically to attend to her needs. All her medication is clearly labelled and administered as prescribed. The care provided for her is beyond other residents. 

Your mother did not follow the doctor’s and staff’s advice. She consumed all types of high sugar content drinks and unhealthy food brought by family. From diabetes mellitus it led to gangrene and the possible amputation of her toes and other organ failure.

Our staff are trained and registered nurses. Residents are never mistreated. The premises are cleaned daily. Food is in accordance to dietary requirements.  

Regarding visits during Covid, it is a clear directive by The Ministry of Health’s MCO (Movement Control Order), visitors are not allowed. It also restricts movement within a certain radius of their registered home address.

To summaries it all, why didn’t you transfer your mother to another nursing home if the conditions you claim were that bad? Why let it drag out for 5 years till she succumbed to all her chronic conditions and old age. 

Don’t bring dishonour to yourself as a man of God. Practice what you preach and don’t be a hypocrite pretending you care so much for your mother at our expense.

reviews.text: 不要再出来害人家父母亲了，赚钱归赚钱不是这样来赚，爸爸放在你们这里顾三个月没吃也没有通知我们，任何情况一问三不知，老人家不吃也没有想方法，我对负责人说是为什么老人家不吃你们没有想方法比如说给奶粉之类的，她回应我你们家属要求我们就会给咯，halo，你们在顾的勒，如果我知道我爸爸不吃肯定都会想办法给他吃一些他能吃的啊，60kg直接瘦到45kg，所有我爸爸情况问了他们都不懂屁股也顾到有伤口，老人痴呆更加严重，我们信任你们才把父母交给你们照顾，不是交给你们送他们去极乐…
reviews.textTranslated: Stop hurting other people's parents. Making money is one thing, not this. My dad has been in your care for three months, and he hasn't eaten and you didn't notify us. You're clueless about anything. You didn't even try to find a solution for him. I asked the person in charge why he wouldn't eat, like giving him formula. She replied, "We'll give it to you if your family asks." "Halo, you're the ones taking care of him. If I'd known my dad wouldn't eat, I would have definitely tried to get him something he could eat. He went from 60kg to 45kg. When I asked about my dad's condition, they didn't understand. They even noticed the wound on his butt. His dementia has gotten worse. We trust you to take care of our parents, not to send them to heaven..."

reviews.text:
送你家的老人家来这里千万要三思而后行。

是一间非常不负责任的疗养院，我父亲住在这里3个月的时间可以暴瘦15KG，平时都是用视频通话来观察我父亲的情况，但是因为我父亲有老人痴呆，所以往往只拍额头给我看，完全看不出他暴瘦的情况，直到我姐姐申请去看望父亲的时候发现父亲严重消瘦，他们也没有人通知我，还坚持说在我打电话给我父亲的时候已经通知我了，可是我曾经在Whastsapp问过我父亲是不是没有吃东西，可是完全没有正面回答过，从一个可以走路进去的老人家到出来是被轮椅推着出来的。如果要不是因为新年要接父亲回家过新年，估计父亲应该被这件疗养院害死了。

发生事情后就算了，也不正面的决绝问题和改善问题，还很不负责任的变成家属的问题，说家属有什么要求可以和疗养院说，那么这间疗养院的意识是照顾好老人不是一个他们应该做的吗？怎么会变成家属要Request呢？从来也没有自动和我们说过任何关于父亲的情况，就连看医生之后有什么情况也没有得到任何通知。之后找人要了解全部情况也只能对到Manager，对到了之后也不懂头不懂尾，最后没办法我直接联系院长也选择直接回避，还有很没有礼貌的直接挂电话。

最后我选择直接带走我的父亲还好意识罚款我一个月的押金，原因是因为我的父亲没有给1 Month Notice所以罚款，疗养院也从来没有给我签署过任何合约，而且我父亲被你们照顾成这个样子，谁还有勇气把自己的父亲送回去给这种商业化的疗养院？不用心，就赚钱。

之后做了身体检查，也确定营养不良。要送自家老宝先考虑，我本身自己不是专业的自己照顾父亲2年了都没有暴瘦15KG，把自己称为疗养院却有本事照顾成这个样子。顺便一提没有你们的照料，我父亲的老人痴呆也没有退化得这么快。
reviews.textTranslated:
Think twice before sending your elderly relatives to this nursing home.

It's an extremely irresponsible facility. My father lost 15kg in three months here. They usually monitor him via video calls, but because he has dementia, they often only show me a picture of his forehead, completely obscuring his emaciated state. It wasn't until my sister applied to visit him that they discovered his severe weight loss. No one notified me, insisting they did when I called him. However, I asked him on WhatsApp if he hadn't eaten, but he never gave a straight answer. He went from being a healthy elderly man who could walk in to being pushed out in a wheelchair. If it weren't for the need to take him home for the New Year, this nursing home would likely have killed him.

After the incident, they didn't address the problem directly or try to improve it. Instead, they irresponsibly turned it into a family issue, saying the family could only communicate their needs to the nursing home. Isn't caring for the elderly their basic responsibility? How did it become a request from the family? They never proactively told us anything about my father's condition, not even after his doctor's visit. When we tried to get full information, we could only speak to the manager, who was also clueless. Finally, I contacted the director, but he avoided the conversation and rudely hung up.

In the end, I took my father with me. Thankfully, they fined me a month's deposit because he hadn't given a one-month notice. The nursing home never signed any contract with me. And after my father was treated like this, who would dare send their father back to such a commercial nursing home? They don't care, they just make money.

Afterwards, a medical check-up confirmed malnutrition. I'd have to think twice before sending my own father. I'm not a professional; I've cared for my father for two years and haven't lost 15kg. This nursing home calls itself a nursing home, yet they've managed to leave him like this. Incidentally, without their care, my father's dementia wouldn't have progressed so quickly.

reviews.text: 垃圾地方，给自家的老人家回去几天回来没有做任何防疫措施导致大部分老人家中covid（其中包括我妈妈），我妈妈中covid了也没有通知家属，直到4月9号早上我妈妈血氧过低送去医院才通知家属。我妈妈在医院躺了9天，吸了9天的氧气，直到4月18号过世了。。院方也没有任何的行动和慰问，直到结算钱的那天尽然把我妈妈不在住的9天钱也算下去，这个地方只是在乎钱和名声而已，要说办事能力的话，只可以说差到离谱。。。想要把自家的父母送过去的必须三思，这件事情就发生在我自己的妈妈身上
reviews.textTranslated: What a rubbish place. They sent their elderly family members back for a few days but didn't take any epidemic prevention measures, which led to most of the elderly family members getting infected with covid (including my mother). My mother got infected with covid but they didn't inform the family members until the morning of April 9 when my mother was sent to the hospital with low blood oxygen. My mother lay in the hospital for 9 days and breathed oxygen for 9 days until she passed away on April 18. The hospital didn't take any action or express any condolences. On the day of settling the money, they even included the money for the 9 days when my mother was not there. This place only cares about money and reputation. As for its ability to do things, it can only be said to be ridiculous. If you want to send your parents there, you must think twice. This happened to my own mother.

reviews.responseFromOwnerText: thanks for rating!
thanks for rating!
thanks for rating!
